return(function(V,w,W,b,r,X,A,y,J,h,u,P,B,k,l,f,R,N,q,e,z,O)k,q,h,B,P,l,N,u,e,J,z,y,R,O,f={},{},462367-462367,function()h=(-348638+348639)+h k[h]=779820+-779819 return h end,function(V)for return W end,function(V)k[V]=k[V]-(484446-484445)if-912053+912053==k[V]then k[V],q[V]=nil,nil end end,function(V,C)local w=P(C)local W=function(W,b,r,X,A,q)return O(V,{W;b,r,X,A,q},C,w)end return W O=#r return w(A)end,function(V,C)local w=P(C)local W=function(W,b,r)return O(V,{W,b,r},C,w)end return W end return(e(268350+10107590,{}))(w(A))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
